translations.es: Los fusibles se han fundido otra vez.
translations.de: Die Sicherungen sind schon wieder rausgeflogen.
translations.it: Sono saltati di nuovo i fusibili.
translations.ja: またヒューズが飛んだ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; determines the noun 'plombs' as a specific set.
Common noun, plural; here refers to electrical fuses, subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb (3rd person plural, present) forming the passé composé with the main verb.
Adverb indicating repetition; modifies the verb phrase.
Past participle; main verb in a compound past (passé composé) with 'avoir', intransitive here ('fuses tripped').

sentences.target: Attention, cette vieille peinture contient du plomb.
sentences.reading: /atɑ̃sjɔ̃ sɛt vjɛj pɛ̃tyʁ kɔ̃tjɛ̃ dy plɔ̃/

translations.fr: Attention, cette vieille peinture contient du plomb.
translations.ipa: /atɑ̃sjɔ̃ sɛt vjɛj pɛ̃tyʁ kɔ̃tjɛ̃ dy plɔ̃/
translations.en: Careful, that old paint contains lead.
translations.es: Cuidado, esa pintura vieja contiene plomo.
translations.de: Vorsicht, diese alte Farbe enthält Blei.
translations.it: Attenzione, quella vernice vecchia contiene piombo.
translations.ko: 조심하세요, 그 오래된 페인트에는 납이 들어 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 小心，那层旧油漆含有铅。
translations.ru: Осторожно, эта старая краска содержит свинец.
translations.pt: Cuidado, essa tinta velha contém chumbo.
translations.he: זהירות, הצבע הישן הזה מכיל עופרת.
translations.tr: Dikkat, o eski boya kurşun içeriyor.
translations.vi: Cẩn thận, lớp sơn cũ đó có chứa chì.
translations.ar: انتبه، ذلك الطلاء القديم يحتوي على رصاص.
translations.nl: Pas op, die oude verf bevat lood.
translations.uk: Обережно, ця стара фарба містить свинець.
translations.hu: Vigyázz, az a régi festék ólmot tartalmaz.
translations.hi: सावधान, उस पुरानी पेंट में सीसा है.
translations.pl: Uwaga, ta stara farba zawiera ołów.
translations.el: Προσοχή, εκείνη η παλιά μπογιά περιέχει μόλυβδο.
translations.nb: Pass på, den gamle malingen inneholder bly.
translations.id: Hati-hati, cat lama itu mengandung timbal.
translations.sv: Se upp, den där gamla färgen innehåller bly.
translations.ro: Atenție, vopseaua aceea veche conține plumb.
translations.cs: Pozor, ta stará barva obsahuje olovo.
translations.da: Pas på, den gamle maling indeholder bly.
translations.fi: Varo, tuo vanha maali sisältää lyijyä.
translations.ja: 気をつけて、その古い塗料には鉛が含まれています。

tokens.explanation: Interjection used to warn or draw the listener’s attention; standalone element.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; specifies the noun 'peinture'.
Adjective, feminine singular; pre-nominal modifier of 'peinture' indicating age.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb (3rd person singular, present); agrees with 'peinture'.
Partitive article (contraction of 'de' + 'le'); introduces a mass noun.
Common mass noun; direct object of 'contient', referring to the metal.

sentences.target: Le pêcheur ajoute un plomb à la ligne.
sentences.reading: /lə peʃœʁ aʒut œ̃ plɔ̃ a la liɲ/

translations.fr: Le pêcheur ajoute un plomb à la ligne.
translations.ipa: /lə peʃœʁ aʒut œ̃ plɔ̃ a la liɲ/
translations.en: The fisherman adds a weight to the line.
translations.es: El pescador añade un plomo al sedal.
translations.de: Der Angler befestigt ein Blei an der Angelschnur.
translations.it: Il pescatore aggiunge un piombino alla lenza.
translations.ko: 낚시꾼이 낚싯줄에 봉돌을 하나 더 달아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 渔夫在钓线上再加一个铅坠。
translations.yue: 漁夫喺魚線度加個鉛墜。
translations.pt: O pescador coloca um chumbo na linha.
translations.vi: Người câu cá gắn thêm chì vào dây câu.
translations.ar: الصياد يضيف ثقلاً إلى خيط الصيد.
translations.nl: De visser zet een loodje op de lijn.
translations.hu: A horgász ólmot tesz a zsinórra.
translations.hi: मछुआरा डोरी पर एक वज़न लगाता है.
translations.el: Ο ψαράς προσθέτει βαρίδι στην πετονιά.
translations.nb: Fiskeren fester et lodd på snøret.
translations.sv: Fiskaren sätter på ett sänke på linan.
translations.ro: Pescarul adaugă un plumb pe fir.
translations.da: Fiskeren sætter et lod på linen.
translations.ja: 釣り人が糸におもりを付ける。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'pêcheur'.
Common noun; subject of the sentence.
Main verb (3rd person singular, present); action performed by the subject.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the direct object.
Common noun; direct object, here the weight used on fishing lines.
Preposition introducing the indirect complement ('la ligne').
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'ligne'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'à', referring to a fishing line.

sentences.target: J’ai perdu un plomb en mangeant.

translations.fr: J’ai perdu un plomb en mangeant.
translations.en: I lost a filling while eating.
translations.es: Se me cayó un empaste mientras comía.
translations.de: Mir ist beim Essen eine Füllung herausgefallen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我吃东西时补牙的填充物掉了。
translations.yue: 我食嘢嗰陣補牙嘅填充物跌咗。
translations.ru: Я потерял пломбу во время еды.
translations.vi: Tôi bị rơi một miếng trám răng khi đang ăn.
translations.nl: Tijdens het eten viel mijn vulling eruit.
translations.uk: Під час їжі в мене випала пломба.
translations.hi: खाते समय मेरे दाँत की फिलिंग निकल गई.
translations.el: Μου έπεσε ένα σφράγισμα την ώρα που έτρωγα.
translations.nb: En fylling falt ut mens jeg spiste.
translations.id: Tambalan gigi saya copot saat sedang makan.
translations.sv: En fyllning lossnade när jag åt.
translations.ro: Mi-a căzut o plombă în timp ce mâncam.
translations.da: En fyldning faldt ud, mens jeg spiste.
translations.ja: 食事中に詰め物が取れた。

tokens.explanation: Auxiliary 'ai' (1st person singular, present) with attached clitic subject 'j'' (contraction of 'je'); forms the passé composé.
Past participle; main verb in the compound past with 'avoir'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the object.
Common noun; direct object, here meaning a dental filling.
Preposition used to form a gerund phrase ('en' + present participle) expressing circumstance.
Present participle used in a gerund construction ('en mangeant'); adverbial modifier indicating the time/circumstance.
